title: rosa formosana
intro: Rosa formosana, also known as the Formosa rose, is a species of rose native to Taiwan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Rosa formosana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support cardiovascular health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
